name: Swell
highlight_text: Best For: Clinics and the healthcare sector
description:
What does Swell do?

Swell's review generator helps businesses actively manage customer feedback, boosting their online presence and reputation.

Source: Swell

Features

  • Sends automated requests to customers via email or SMS, prompting them to leave a review after a purchase or service interaction.
  • Offers customizable email and SMS templates that can be tailored to match the brand's tone and messaging.
  • Manages the entire review collection process, from initial request to review submission, in a streamlined manner.
  • Integrates with various CRM systems and review platforms (like Google, Yelp) to ensure reviews are gathered and displayed consistently across platforms.

    • Benefits

  • Boosts the number of reviews received by making it easy for customers to leave feedback.
  • Helps maintain a positive online reputation by generating a steady stream of authentic customer reviews.
  • Higher review volumes and positive feedback can improve search engine rankings and attract more potential customers.
  • Demonstrates proactive customer care by soliciting feedback and showing responsiveness to customer opinions.
  • Provides valuable insights into customer satisfaction and areas for improvement based on feedback trends.

    • Pros

    ✅ Has a great user interface which is easy to use

    Cons

    ❌ Does not have many filters to sort through reviews

    Offers custom pricing options
